text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hit me. One more card.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Ha! You want to hit? You do know there's a fine
line between courage and recklessness, right?
You're going to bust for sure.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Gee, thanks for your concern. Now I know who to
talk to next time I want a lesson in settling for
small victories.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Fine by me. Actually, I was just thinking it's about time I taught you a harsh lesson in reality.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I'm going to wipe that smug look right off
your face.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! This looks like it could be bad news! We
need to go call a teacher or something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Visiting the cafeteria, I happen upon some
commotion unfolding.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Can you come here for a sec? Some
big trouble's brewing here!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
This is bad! The showdown between those two is
getting way out of hand...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
They're wagering their whole futures! The loser
has to drop out of the academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't a game anymore! I need to put a stop to
this at once!
choice_data_list:
The two of you need to calm down! Stop this
game!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Quit raining on our parade. I'm on fire here, so
just butt out.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, keep out of it. Let's do this, Nakayama.
Time to switch dealer.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see you screw up your hand and
bust.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You're one punk of a kid, you know that? I'm
going to put an end to this right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things are so heated that neither of them are
paying me any attention!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't just stand by and do nothing. I have to
stop them!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama & Sirius
text_block_list.text: ...What?
choice_data_list: If I win, neither of you are dropping out!
If I win, neither of you are dropping out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! How low you've fallen! What happened
to all that confidence you had a minute ago?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm whooped over and over without ever coming
close to winning. These two are just too good!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I think it's time you called it quits, Trainer. Unless
you're enjoying this losing streak you're on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I can't afford to back down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The game is blackjack. The objective is to build a
hand of cards with a total value as close to
twenty-one as possible without going over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I have sixteen. It seems a bit weak, but
if I add another card I might go over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have to win this game! But should I hit or stand?
choice_data_list: Stand. I'll stick with my current hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm dealt a ten, meaning I've gone over
twenty-one and busted...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Ah ha ha! That really blew up in your face! Sure
was fun to watch, though!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Looks like it's our win.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Haha! Hahaha! What a pitiful sight! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I've got twenty-one. That's a blackjack.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Same here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sixteen versus two hands of twenty-one. Well,
there goes the victory I needed so desperately...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Haha! Hahaha! What a pitiful sight! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Given the look on your face after that
spectacular loss, I've decided to withdraw for
today.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I'm saying that you killed the mood.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Besides, we already got our fill from watching you
lose.
choice_data_list:
...I'd prefer you to keep these intense duels to
the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I'll think about it.
